primitives.name: Investigation
primitives.semantics: A reasoning objective together with the conditions under which it is pursued.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when objective or pursuit conditions differ.

primitives.name: Representation
primitives.semantics: An explicitly distinguishable object used to denote, encode, or refer.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct by token identity and denotational role.

primitives.name: Representational Structure
primitives.semantics: Representations together with explicit organizational relations.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when membership or organizing relations differ.

primitives.name: Interpretation
primitives.semantics: A mapping assigning semantic content to representations.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when any assigned meaning differs.

primitives.name: Reasoning Calculus
primitives.semantics: Rules governing admissible transformations and resolutions.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when any admissible transition or resolution rule differs.

primitives.name: Task
primitives.semantics: A target condition and evaluation context.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when target or evaluation context differs.

primitives.name: Sign
primitives.semantics: A distinguishable bearer inseparable from its assigned content.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when bearer or assigned content differs.

primitives.name: Configuration
primitives.semantics: An organized collection of signs and relations.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when signs or relations differ.

primitives.name: Procedure
primitives.semantics: Permitted changes of configurations and stopping conditions.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when permitted change or stopping condition differs.

primitives.name: Directive
primitives.semantics: A unified objective together with the rules for pursuing it.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when objective or any pursuit rule differs.

primitives.name: Token
primitives.semantics: A distinguishable symbolic item.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct by token identity.

primitives.name: Arrangement
primitives.semantics: Tokens together with explicit relations.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when tokens or relations differ.

primitives.name: Valuation
primitives.semantics: An assignment of content to tokens.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when any assignment differs.

primitives.name: Object
primitives.semantics: Any explicitly distinguishable entity.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct by object identity.

primitives.name: Relation
primitives.semantics: An explicitly specified association among objects.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct by ordered participants and relation type.

primitives.name: Transformation
primitives.semantics: A conditionally permitted change to objects or relations.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when precondition or effect differs.

primitives.name: State
primitives.semantics: A complete valuation of declared variables at a step.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when any declared variable differs.

primitives.name: Transition
primitives.semantics: A guarded relation between predecessor and successor states.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when guard or successor relation differs.

primitives.name: Observation
primitives.semantics: A projection from states or traces to externally compared values.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when projection differs.

primitives.name: Object
primitives.semantics: A typed process condition.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct according to the category's object equality.

primitives.name: Morphism
primitives.semantics: A composable transformation between typed conditions.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct according to domain, codomain, and arrow equality.

primitives.name: Functorial Observation
primitives.semantics: A structure-preserving mapping to an observation category.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when object or arrow mapping differs.

primitives.name: Message
primitives.semantics: A distinguishable information-bearing value.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct by value in the declared alphabet.

primitives.name: Channel
primitives.semantics: A conditional mapping from input messages and channel state to output messages and state.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when conditional mapping differs.

primitives.name: Decoder
primitives.semantics: A mapping from messages or histories to assessed content.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when decoded output differs for any admissible input.

primitives.name: Commitment
primitives.semantics: A content-bearing item that may be held, changed, or withdrawn.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when content or commitment status differs.

primitives.name: Context
primitives.semantics: Conditions fixing relevance and assessment of commitments.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when relevance or assessment conditions differ.

primitives.name: Revision
primitives.semantics: A permitted change in a commitment set.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when applicability or change differs.

primitives.name: Event
primitives.semantics: A typed occurrence at a position in an ordered process.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct by type, participants, and process position.

primitives.name: Fluent
primitives.semantics: A property whose value may vary across process positions.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct by property identity and value domain.

primitives.name: Constraint
primitives.semantics: A condition governing event occurrence or fluent evolution.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when satisfaction conditions differ.

primitives.name: Node
primitives.semantics: A typed distinguishable vertex carrying declared attributes.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct by node identity.

primitives.name: Edge
primitives.semantics: A typed directed dependency between nodes carrying declared attributes.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct by source, target, type, and attributes.

primitives.name: Rewrite
primitives.semantics: A guarded graph transformation rule.
primitives.identity_conditions: Distinct when match condition or graph replacement differs.
